pitchEn: A top-down survival arcade game: you stand in the middle while projectiles fly in from every side and you move to dodge them across 10 levels of rising difficulty. Beat your best score and climb a local leaderboard.
newFeaturesEn: First release of Dodge Master: 10 levels of top-down projectile-dodging survival with a local top-100 leaderboard in 15 languages.

dataHandling.notes: Fully offline game. No network, no accounts. Only a self-entered nickname, score and language are stored on-device; nothing leaves the device.

reviewerRemarksEn: Launch the app; on first run pick a language and tap Start, then choose a level and press PLAY. Move your character to dodge incoming projectiles until the level ends. No account, login, or internet connection is required; an optional name for the local leaderboard is the only input.
